snippet.title: ‘When I die, I don’t want Friends to be the first thing that’s mentioned:’ Matthew Perry #shorts
snippet.description:
Ottawa-raised actor Matthew Perry, known as Chandler Bing on Friends, was found dead in his hot tub over the weekend. He was 54. An investigation into how he died is ongoing, and it may take weeks before his cause of death is determined.

In a CBC Q interview from November 2022, Perry talked about his memoir, Friends, Lovers, and the Big Terrible Thing, which details his long journey with addiction, fame and recovery.  

He told Q host Tom Power why he didn’t want to be remembered only for Friends, but his work to help people with addiction. 

Read more: http://www.cbc.ca/news

snippet.title: Biography of John C Maxwell
snippet.description:
Shocking Secrets Revealed: You Won't Believe What Hillary Clinton Did Before Entering Politics!
 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eDaaE4VQdts 

Biography of Meghan Markle
https://youtu.be/caJACoDsvio

Prince Edward biography
https://youtu.be/6vBm-PvJG9U

Prince Andrew biography
https://youtu.be/UqrP_oPUOp8

Princess Diana biography
https://youtu.be/_Ofk8MSL6Zk

Prince Charles biography
https://youtu.be/ah4Y5QGT6lY

Prince William biography
https://youtu.be/k-aLiEe7YzA

Biography of Camilla, Queen Consort
https://youtu.be/zohgfyhJ7L8

Prince Harry Biography 
https://youtu.be/Kcvf2J5FD4o

Learn How Successful People Do In Thier Life:
 https://www.youtube.com/@SuccessfulPeopleBiograph-um6yi/videos

Hello and welcome to this video on the biography of John C. Maxwell. John is a renowned leadership coach, speaker, and author who has impacted the lives of millions of people around the world. In this video, we'll take a closer look at his life, his achievements, and his philosophy on leadership.



Early Life:
John was born on February 20, 1947, in Garden City, Michigan. He grew up in a family of pastors and followed in their footsteps by becoming a pastor himself. He received his undergraduate degree from Ohio Christian University and went on to earn a Master of Divinity from Azusa Pacific University, as well as a Doctor of Ministry degree from Fuller Theological Seminary.



Career:
John's career in leadership began when he became the pastor of a small church in Indiana. He quickly realized that his true passion was not just preaching, but also developing leaders. He left the church and started a leadership development company, which eventually became the John Maxwell Company. He has since written over 100 books on leadership, which have sold over 25 million copies worldwide. He has also given talks and training sessions to Fortune 500 companies, government agencies, and non-profit organizations.



Philosophy on Leadership:
John's philosophy on leadership is centered around the idea that leadership is not about being in charge, but about serving others. He believes that great leaders are those who empower their team members and help them reach their full potential. He also emphasizes the importance of developing a positive attitude, taking responsibility for one's actions, and constantly learning and growing.



Achievements:
John has received numerous awards and honors for his work in leadership, including the Mother Teresa Prize for Global Peace and Leadership from the Luminary Leadership Network. He has also been named the #1 leadership expert in the world by Inc. Magazine and the American Management Association.



Conclusion:
In conclusion, John C. Maxwell is a true pioneer in the field of leadership development. His books, talks, and training sessions have inspired millions of people around the world to become better leaders. His philosophy on leadership, which emphasizes serving others, taking responsibility, and constantly growing, is one that we can all learn from. Thank you for watching this video on the biography of John C. Maxwell.

Biography of Camilla, Queen Consort
https://youtu.be/zohgfyhJ7L8

Prince Harry Biography 
https://youtu.be/Kcvf2J5FD4o

Learn How Successful People Do In Thier Life:
 https://www.youtube.com/@SuccessfulPeopleBiograph-um6yi/videos

Hello and welcome to this video on the biography of John C. Maxwell. John is a renowned leadership coach, speaker, and author who has impacted the lives of millions of people around the world. In this video, we'll take a closer look at his life, his achievements, and his philosophy on leadership.



Early Life:
John was born on February 20, 1947, in Garden City, Michigan. He grew up in a family of pastors and followed in their footsteps by becoming a pastor himself. He received his undergraduate degree from Ohio Christian University and went on to earn a Master of Divinity from Azusa Pacific University, as well as a Doctor of Ministry degree from Fuller Theological Seminary.



Career:
John's career in leadership began when he became the pastor of a small church in Indiana. He quickly realized that his true passion was not just preaching, but also developing leaders. He left the church and started a leadership development company, which eventually became the John Maxwell Company. He has since written over 100 books on leadership, which have sold over 25 million copies worldwide. He has also given talks and training sessions to Fortune 500 companies, government agencies, and non-profit organizations.



Philosophy on Leadership:
John's philosophy on leadership is centered around the idea that leadership is not about being in charge, but about serving others. He believes that great leaders are those who empower their team members and help them reach their full potential. He also emphasizes the importance of developing a positive attitude, taking responsibility for one's actions, and constantly learning and growing.



Achievements:
John has received numerous awards and honors for his work in leadership, including the Mother Teresa Prize for Global Peace and Leadership from the Luminary Leadership Network. He has also been named the #1 leadership expert in the world by Inc. Magazine and the American Management Association.



Conclusion:
In conclusion, John C. Maxwell is a true pioneer in the field of leadership development. His books, talks, and training sessions have inspired millions of people around the world to become better leaders. His philosophy on leadership, which emphasizes serving others, taking responsibility, and constantly growing, is one that we can all learn from. Thank you for watching this video on the biography of John C. Maxwell.

snippet.title: Small Tornado on a Parking Lot
snippet.description:
content is altered or ai generated #shorts 

Small Tornado on a Parking Lot

There are Four Major Kinds Of Storms: Thunderstorms, Tornadoes, Hurricane
How Do Tornadoes Form ?
Tornadoes form when warm, humid air collides with cold, dry air. The denser cold air is pushed over the warm air, usually producing thunderstorms. The warm air rises through the colder air, causing an updraft. The updraft will begin to rotate if winds vary sharply in speed or direction

.
Britain's Got Talent 2024 auditions (BGT 2024) is underway and it’s on FIRE! A Remarkable array of talents that rival America's Got Talent (AGT) in its diversity and creativity. The auditions for BGT 2024 were a spectacle in themselves, with moments that remind us of Susan Boyle, Calum Scott and MB14. The golden buzzer moments are particularly memorable, reminiscent of previous seasons' standout performances by the likes of Loren Allred, whose rendition of "Never Enough" from The Greatest Showman became a viral BGT sensation. This year, the show saw rising stars like Sydney Christmas with her unique rendition of Tomorrow. Even unexpected acts like Batman and the enchanting little girl who stole hearts with her soulful singing added to the charm of Britain's Got Talent 2024. With each episode, the competition is growing fiercer with singers, choir’s magic acts and so much more. STAY TUNED!
